programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E11
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E11

programme.title: Munsters 221
programme.desc: Munsters 221

programme.title: Addams Family 118
programme.desc: Addams Family 118

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac overhears mystery writers researching a book and thinks theyre plotting to kill Merrill A rock star falls for a deaf woman Docs honeymooning friend Mitzi thinks her new husband Vinnie doesnt really love her

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Dr Tracy treats an injured leopard and releases it into the wild but a visiting trade commissioner who wants to hunt for big game sets his sights on the leopard for his trophy Dr Tracy sets out to derail his plans

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jennifer overhears an acquaintance and his mistress planning to murder his wife on the ski slopes she and Jonathan jet off to Vail to prevent it -- but are they too late to save her on the ski trail

programme.title: Cagney 408
programme.desc: A weekend spent clearing up lousy precinct paperwork leads Chris and Mary Beth to race to serve a warrant before the statute of limitations expires Meanwhile Det Petrie finds his weekend used up painting his apartment

programme.title: Starsky 215
programme.desc: Starsky 215

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: A revolutionary breaks her father former dictator Marios Guzman out of a military prison Because her father received no medical treatment in prison she has her followers kidnap Doc who is on a fishing trip with String String vows to follow Doc but is advised not to get himself or Airwolf involved in anything political As it turns out a former comrade-in-arms of Guzmans learns that he is dying and plans to use his final address to the people as a rallying point to retake the government

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Mickis young nephew befriends the reanimated corpse of a boy residing in the local haunted house

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo has a new love interest - her science teacher She even gives up baseball to have more time to dream of him

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joes latest scheme is to sell goat milk as a cure for baldness

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: It has been more than forty years since Nick has seen his close friend Katherine Barrington and her secretary Madelyn Pinchot

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A woman is driven to murder when her newborns cursed cradle seeks revenge

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric feels responsible for an elderly woman who is committed to a mental institution by her daughter after she reports to the police she saw Eric in his werewolf form He takes a job as a custodian at the institution to look after her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After approaching a convicted fugitive Nick is convinced of her innocence but must prove it before she is put to death

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Tiger a female underground agent is arrested while trying to document some secret German bases and is held in Paris for questioning So Hogan and LeBeau become stowaways aboard Klinks staff car and head for Paris to free her

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton begins to regret having so harshly punished the 73 Crew when McHale and The Boys - While in the process of trying to rid their island of a bothersome bird - Give The Captain the impression that they are out to get even

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton accuses Parker of cowardice after Parker loses his cool during the pursuit of a Japanese patrol boat But Parker redeems himself when - After a little pep-talk from McHale - He orchestrates the destruction of a German U-Boat on a mission to rendezvous with a Japanese patrol

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A bet between sergeants and Sergeant Carters lies result in Gomer dating Miss Camp Henderson and taking her to Lookout Point

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Both Gomer and Sergeant Carter are conned by an old bum

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find parts of an ancient Hieroglyphic stone tablet that may tell them the way to get off the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Determined to fit into a tight Anniversary Dress and concerned that she is taking after her corpulent Aunt Bessie Kate embarks upon a crash program of diet and exercise

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After breaking a date with Tommy Hassie takes things out on her family

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL sends 86 and 99 into a circus to look for a smuggling operation

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The CONTROL agents are trapped on a KAOS island

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ enlists an unlikely ally in his effort to bring down Rutherford T Grant after the crooked captain frames a bank robbery on Samantha Stacks and Angie Final episode of the series

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger influences Wilbur to grow a mustache and Carol insists that he shave it Meanwhile Ed wants Wilbur to install a shower in the barn

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Alex and Wally bet to see who can date Julie Artie hopes to date starlet Mona Doug and his parents little people sail together and he runs into Beth from home Hes attracted to her but little people make her uncomfortable

programme.title: WKRP 119
programme.desc: WKRP 119

programme.title: WKRP 118
programme.desc: WKRP 118

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: While home ill with a fever Wood manages to wedge himself in a window after locking himself out of the house

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood and Ava go away for a romantic break

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: The sheriff discovers that a shooting victim had two wives the Feds shut down the Savoys skim to Chicago Dixon helps a young actress in town to shoot a movie and both sheriff Lamb and Vincent suspect that Jack killed Johnny Rizzo

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A precognitive young woman sees herself being murdered but it is her unknown twin sister who turns up dead

programme.title: Newhart - 715
programme.desc: Newhart - 715

programme.title: Newhart - 510
programme.desc: Newhart - 510

programme.title: Major 125
programme.desc: Major 125

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The rock band The Mosquitoes arrive on the island for some much-needed RR But the castaways try to make their lives miserable so theyll want to leave--and take them with them

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Garner go undercover at a chicken fast-food outlet called California Roasters dressed in outrageously silly chicken costumes to arrest a drug dealer But later a hostage situation develops at the Nights club when Mitch Garner Ryan Lou and other patrons are held hostage by the two drug dealers brothers demanding that he be released from prison

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: On a planned de-stressing holiday Arcane is attacked by an old enemy who is supposed to be locked away in an asylum But LaRoche is a master of hypnotism and forces unlikely allies to help him

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Space1999

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While trying to outfox Rosco Bo and Luke happen upon a race track where Cale Yarborough is secretly testing a new turbo supercharger for an upcoming race The Duke boys offer to help Cale keep the engine away from the dreaded Jethro brothers who have approached Boss and Rosco for help in obtaining the engine at all costs

programme.title: Hercules 221
programme.desc: Hercules 221

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Paul Chandler plots an attack on the Taelon Embassy in DC with the ship he stole from Lili He begs her to join him in beginning an all out war

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two spoilt rich girls inveigle Will against his will into taking them into the swamp so they can perform a ritual to give them three wishes In the course of teaching them a lesson in humility Will makes a discovery about himself

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble meets with a fraternity brother who is now a professor of sleep research at a university and has seen the one-armed man working there The professor has an elaborate plan to extract proof from the man that he killed Kimbles wife

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As the powerful Barkley family and surrounding Valley community face the prospect of losing their land to a ruthless railroad baron a mysterious stranger arrives with life-changing news for the family

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: In a politically turbulent Mexico full of revolutionaries Cheyenne encounters a sexy blond pickpocket singer in Rio Hondo She arrived on the stage with a local rancher who owes Cheyenne money from a cattle deal and he wants to be paid

programme.desc: A Vietnam veteran absent without leave from the Army attempts to steal the son hes never seen; guest James Stacy

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IM force is tasked to prevent a rigged election in a small Latin American nation from happening and enabling the results to be genuine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric feels responsible for an elderly woman who is committed to a mental institution by her daughter after she reports to the police she saw Eric in his werewolf form He takes a job as a custodian at the institution to look after her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After approaching a convicted fugitive Nick is convinced of her innocence but must prove it before she is put to death

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues with some hard hitting action in MMA! This episode features an amateur matchup between Joe Mapanda and debut Sheldon Williams. Following are pros Dusty Kramps vs. former Hard Knocks Amateur Champion, Devon Smith. Our final fight for the evening is a pro bout between dynamic fighters Justin Schmit and Vyron Phillips.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Raul Tutarauli vs. Artur Lemos

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: One of the most experienced fighters in the series, Nick Thompson has the scars to prove it. Ansar Chalangov will be looking to come out hard for the Russians.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Luke Theriault v. Justin Sander

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alexey Makhno v. Michel Silva

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.desc: Paul Jansen v. Percy De Maeyer Anas Araas v. Andre Estavao Vlad Koshel v. Boubaker El Bakouri Perry Reichling v. Mohammed Dadoo Yassine Ambar v. Jhon Binkhurst Sheena Widdershoven v. Amara Vers Marcel Verhaar v. Hafid “The Sniper”

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Alex Martinez HK39

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Fransisco Azevendo as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: No description.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While Link and Zelda are at Lanas royal ball the furious Mother Brain fires Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo for failing to capture the Triforce So Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo steal the Triforce pieces for themselves

programme.title: Dugeons Dragons
programme.desc: A terrifying creature called The Darkling has been kidnapping people for a thousand years A few more victims will give him the power to take over the entire Realm The team must stop The Darkling but he is too much for them

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget protects armoured cars from Dr Claw

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce follows a clue to Audric and meets up with the gambler Vendetta who has a tape regarding his father but Jayce has to win it in a game It is a trap laid by Saw Boss Vendetta plays a game with Herc to settle an old debt of Hercs

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gar lies to his son and daughter Octo and Seena saying Audric stole the root that he developed and that Jayce has taken credit for everything Gar is taken by Saw Boss and instructs Octo to get help from the Lightning League

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Duke Windsor is in possession of one of three rings that can point the way to untold riches buried at Sunhenge The second is on display at a Renaissance fair and the third is about to be uncovered at an archaeological dig

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Miles Mayhem has gotten hold of Brian the Brain a super computer that controls a nuclear sub With it he demands full control of the Panamal Canal
